upasarga_meanings.meaning: BArA dekara nAva para caढ़ jAnA
Upara se jAnA uttara denA javAba denA
duHKa se tEra jAnA mukti pAnA

upasargachandrika.example_text: aSmanvatI rIyate saMraBaDvamuttizWata prataratA saKAyaH' (f॰10.53.8) prataratA (=pratarata)=tarata

tAM nadIM kzatriyAH SUrA raTanAgahayaplavEH praterurbahavo rAjan (BA॰BIzma॰103.37) prateruH=teruH=utteruH
